\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Abstract base for incident fields (excitations) used in SIE. 

Derived classes must implement both pointwise evaluations and the RWG-\/based integral projections that populate the excitation vectors. When working in a layered background, implementations typically rely on a layered Green\textquotesingle{}s function provided via \doxylink{classIncidentField_a03028097aa5da8ba73cd92af43c78cd9}{set\+Grn\+Fun\+Layered}. 

Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{IncidentField_8h_source_l00034}{34}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{IncidentField_8h_source}{Incident\+Field.\+h}}.

RWG projection of the incident electric field. 

Performs the scalar test integral on the triangle supporting the RWG basis function {\ttfamily f} to assemble the electric-\/field excitation entry. 
\begin{DoxyParams}{Parameters}
{\em f} & Pointer to the RWG test function. \\
\hline
\end{DoxyParams}
\begin{DoxyReturn}{Returns}
Complex scalar contribution for the excitation vector. 
\end{DoxyReturn}
